parameters.name: offer_id
parameters.description: The offer ID. Used to filter for trades originating from a specific offer.

parameters.name: base_asset_type
parameters.description: The type for the base asset. Either `native`, `credit_alphanum4`, or `credit_alphanum12`.

parameters.name: base_asset_issuer
parameters.description: The Stellar address of the base asset’s issuer. Required if the `base_asset_type` is not `native`.

parameters.name: base_asset_code
parameters.description: The code for the base asset. Required if the `base_asset_type` is not `native`.

parameters.name: counter_asset_type
parameters.description: The type for the counter asset. Either native, credit_alphanum4, or credit_alphanum12.

parameters.name: counter_asset_issuer
parameters.description: The Stellar address of the counter asset’s issuer. Required if the `counter_asset_type` is not `native`.

parameters.name: counter_asset_code
parameters.description: The code for the counter asset. Required if the `counter_asset_type` is not `native`.

parameters.name: trade_type
parameters.description: Can be set to all, orderbook, or liquidity_pools to filter only trades executed across a given mechanism.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: A number that points to a specific location in a collection of responses and is pulled from the paging_token value of a record.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: A designation of the order in which records should appear. Options include `asc` (ascending) or `desc` (descending). If this argument isn’t set, it defaults to `asc`.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of records returned. The limit can range from 1 to 200 - an upper limit that is hardcoded in Horizon for performance reasons. If this argument isn’t designated, it defaults to 10.
